uplink.description: all sensors present (air temp/humidity, surface/head temp, battery)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds winter payload (device 300, flags 0x0007 = all three sensor blocks). Raw 16-bit words chosen so air temp ~= -2 C and humidity ~= 85% sit well inside vocabulary bounds; surface/head probes at -1.5/5.0 C. expected.data authored from the upstream Apache-2.0 reference decoder (reference/upstream-codec.js) re-mapped onto the normalized vocabulary.

Input taken verbatim from upstream dl-wrm-codec.yaml example 1; expected.data authored here by re-mapping the upstream per-sensor values onto the normalized vocabulary (air.temperature/relativeHumidity rounded to 2 dp, battery to 3 dp; surface/head temps as camelCase extras).
Synthetic: first byte 3 instead of the protocol v2 marker; mirrors the upstream version guard.
